title: The Nyaban Brothers Enter the Battle
description: On pages 12–15, the battle for Syrup Village intensifies as the Straw Hats, Usopp, and the village’s defenders confront Kuro’s pirates.
scene: The quiet village becomes a battlefield, with Usopp’s lies turning into real courage and the Straw Hats forcing Kuro’s plan to unravel.

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: Stop Dreaming! Even with three swords, you're still no match for us!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: You don't know the differ- once...

dialogue.speaker: Zoro
dialogue.text: between "Using three swords" and "using three swords style"!

dialogue.speaker: Black Cat Pirate
dialogue.text: Nyaban broth- ERS! We're Count- ing on you!!!

dialogue.speaker: Kaya
dialogue.text: finish them off within these 5 minutes!!

summary: This part pushes the arc from conspiracy into open battle, testing Usopp’s courage and the Straw Hats’ trust in him.
